name: 100k tax trap - allowance fully eliminated (£125,140)
description: Single person earning £125,140 - the exact threshold where the personal allowance is fully eliminated (£12,570 / 0.5 = £25,140 above £100k). Beyond this, the 60% trap ends.

sources.description: Rates identical to 2025/26. Manual calculation verified using UK tax bracket rules.
